notableEvents.label: Josh Lowe grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Josh Lowe hits a grand slam (6) to right field. Vaughn Grissom scores. Wade Meckler scores. Oswald Peraza scores.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Athletics challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Aaron Civale picks off Denzer Guzman at 1st on throw to first baseman Joey Meneses.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz flies out sharply to center fielder Jose Siri.
